evals.prompt: We just purchased 6sense and want to set it up for account-based marketing. We use Salesforce as our CRM. What should we do first and how do we get value quickly?
evals.expected_output: Phased setup guide covering WebTag installation, intent topic configuration, ICP definition, segment creation, Salesforce integration, and Sales Intelligence deployment

assertions.name: webtag_setup
assertions.description: Must recommend installing the WebTag (JavaScript snippet) on the website as a first step for Company Identification

assertions.name: intent_topic_config
assertions.description: Must explain configuring intent topics in Signalverse — selecting relevant keywords/topics for their product category

assertions.name: salesforce_integration
assertions.description: Must cover the native Salesforce integration for bidirectional sync of account scores, buying stages, and intent data

evals.prompt: We're evaluating 6sense vs Demandbase for our ABM program. Our main priorities are intent data quality and B2B advertising. Which platform is better for us?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of 6sense and Demandbase covering intent data approaches, advertising capabilities, pricing, and recommendation based on stated priorities

assertions.name: intent_data_comparison
assertions.description: Must compare 6sense's proprietary Signalverse (1T+ signals, AI-driven buying stage predictions) vs Demandbase's reliance on Bombora partnership for intent data

assertions.name: advertising_comparison
assertions.description: Must note that Demandbase has deeper advertising roots and broader ad network integrations, while 6sense has caught up with display, LinkedIn sync, and retargeting

assertions.name: pricing_context
assertions.description: Must mention that both platforms are enterprise-priced ($50K-200K+/year) with custom quotes and multi-year contracts

evals.prompt: I want to use the 6sense API to identify which companies are visiting our pricing page and enrich them with firmographic data in real-time. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Technical guide covering Company Identification API for IP resolution, People Enrichment API for firmographic data, authentication with API tokens, and integration approach

assertions.name: company_id_api
assertions.description: Must describe the Company Identification API endpoint (epsilon.6sense.com/v3/company/details) and explain it resolves IP addresses to company firmographics

assertions.name: api_auth
assertions.description: Must explain authentication using org-level API tokens provisioned in 6sense platform settings

assertions.name: credit_system
assertions.description: Must mention that API calls consume credits from the plan allocation and should be budgeted accordingly
